evals.name: shipped-product-repo
evals.prompt: can you put together a rundown of what the team's been working on lately in the fedi repo? something i can forward to the ops folks, they're not engineers so keep it readable
evals.expected_output: Inline briefing of at most 10 plain-language product items plus a linked HTML report. Liveness claims verified against release tags and production feature flags, not inferred from merges. Native and web release states distinguished where they differ.

evals.name: pre-product-repo
evals.prompt: what's moving in fedibtc/decentralized-federations? i want a product update on it for thursday
evals.expected_output: A real report at the capability altitude (what is being built and how far along), with an explicit up-front statement that none of it is in users' hands, and no Shipped status anywhere. Not an empty report.

evals.name: multi-repo-merged
evals.prompt: i need one summary covering both fedibtc/fedi and fedibtc/decentralized-federations for the leadership sync tomorrow. what's happening across both?
evals.expected_output: A single merged ranked list covering both repos, each item tagged with its source repo, rendered as one HTML report rather than two separate reports.
